---
pagetitle: "NBA Elo Forecast | Above .500"
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
from above500 import nba_elo, render
from html import escape

f = nba_elo.forecast()

print(f'<span class="kicker">{escape(f["league"])}</span>')
print(f'<h1 class="headline">{escape(f["name"])}</h1>')
print(f'<p class="dek">{escape(f["description"])}</p>')
print(render.byline(f))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.games_section(f, "upcoming", "Upcoming games", "Win probabilities"))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.games_section(f, "final", "Recent results", "Model probability vs. outcome"))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.standings_table(f))
print(render.methodology_box(f))
```
